title: AN ACT CONVERTING THE GENERAL EVANGELISTA PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE CITY OF BACOOR, PROVINCE OF CAVITE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

chunks.text:
H. No. 3282; 109 OG No. 34, 5787 (August 26, 2013)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 10549, May 15, 2013 ]

AN ACT CONVERTING THE GENERAL EVANGELISTA PROVINCIAL ROAD IN THE CITY OF BACOOR, PROVINCE OF CAVITE INTO A NATIONAL ROAD AND PROVIDING FUNDS THEREFOR

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The 4.43-kilometer General Evangelista Provincial Road in the City of Bacoor, Province of Cavite is hereby converted into a national road under the jurisdiction of the Department of Public Works and Highways.

SEC. 2. The Secretary of the Department of Public Works and Highways shall include in the Departmentâs program the improvement, maintenance and repair of the said road, the funding of which shall be included in the annual General Appropriations Act.

SEC. 3. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved,

(Sgd.)

JUAN PONCE ENRILE

President of the Senate

(Sgd.)

FELICIANO BELMONTE JR.

Speaker of the House

of Representatives

This Act which originated in the House of Representatives was finally passed by the House of Representatives and the Senate on March 23, 2011 and December 18, 2012, respectively.

(Sgd.)

EDWIN B. BELEN

Acting Senate Secretary

(Sgd.)

MARILYN B. BARUA-YAP

Secretary General

House of Representatives

Approved: MAY 15 2013

(Sgd.)

BENIGNO S. AQUINO III

President of the Philippines
